<content>1: import type { Env } from '../types.js';

31: function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200): Response {
32:   return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
33:     status,
34:     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
35:   });
36: }
37: 
38: function parseInteger(input: unknown, fallback: number, min: number, max: number): number {
39:   if (typeof input !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(input)) {
40:     return fallback;
41:   }
42:   const value = Math.floor(input);
43:   if (value < min) {
44:     return min;
45:   }
46:   if (value > max) {
47:     return max;
48:   }
49:   return value;
50: }
51: 
52: function parseBoolean(input: unknown, fallback: boolean): boolean {
53:   if (typeof input !== 'boolean') {
54:     return fallback;
55:   }
56:   return input;
57: }
58: 
59: function isSafeRelativeOutputDir(input: string): boolean {
60:   if (!input || input === '.') {
61:     return false;
62:   }
63:   if (input.startsWith('/') || input.includes('..') || input.includes('\\')) {
64:     return false;
65:   }
66:   return input.split('/').every((segment) => Boolean(segment) && segment !== '.');
67: }
68: 
69: function parseDeployOutputDir(input: unknown): string | null {
70:   if (typeof input !== 'string') {
71:     return null;
72:   }
73:   const trimmed = input.trim().replace(/\\/g, '/').replace(/^\.\//, '').replace(/\/+$/, '');
74:   return trimmed || null;
75: }

77: function buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload: {
78:   provider: string;
79:   retry: { maxRetries: number };
80:   validation: { runBuildIfPresent: boolean; runTestsIfPresent: boolean };
81:   autoFix: { rehydrateBaseline: boolean; bootstrapToolchain: boolean };
82:   toolchain: { manager: string | null; version: string | null };
83:   cache: { dependencyCache: boolean };
84:   deploy: { outputDir: string | null };
85:   rollbackOnFailure: boolean;
86:   provenance: { trigger: string; taskId: string | null; operationId: string | null; note: string | null };
87: }): Record<string, unknown> {
88:   const payload: Record<string, unknown> = {
89:     provider: requestPayload.provider,
90:     retry: requestPayload.retry,
91:     validation: requestPayload.validation,
92:     rollbackOnFailure: requestPayload.rollbackOnFailure,
93:     provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
94:   };
95: 
96:   if (requestPayload.autoFix.rehydrateBaseline || requestPayload.autoFix.bootstrapToolchain) {
97:     payload.autoFix = requestPayload.autoFix;
98:   }
99: 
100:   if (requestPayload.toolchain.manager || requestPayload.toolchain.version) {
101:     payload.toolchain = requestPayload.toolchain;
102:   }
103: 
104:   if (!requestPayload.cache.dependencyCache) {
105:     payload.cache = requestPayload.cache;
106:   }
107: 
108:   if (requestPayload.deploy.outputDir) {
109:     payload.deploy = requestPayload.deploy;
110:   }
111: 
112:   return payload;
113: }

115: function nextActionForDeploymentError(code: string | undefined): string | null {
116:   switch (code) {
117:     case 'toolchain_detect_failed':
118:       return 'Verify package.json and lockfile metadata, then retry deploy.';
119:     case 'corepack_missing':
120:       return 'Use a sandbox image with corepack available, or switch to npm toolchain.';
121:     case 'package_manager_bootstrap_failed':
122:       return 'Confirm the requested package manager version is valid and retry deploy.';
123:     case 'validation_tool_missing':
124:       return 'Disable build/test validation for this deploy or install required tooling in the sandbox image.';
125:     case 'validation_command_failed':
126:       return 'Review test/build output, fix project errors, and retry deploy.';
127:     case 'invalid_project_root':
128:       return 'Set workspace source project root to a safe relative path and retry deploy.';
129:     case 'baseline_missing':
130:     case 'baseline_rehydrate_failed':
131:       return 'Reset the workspace and retry deploy to rebuild git baseline.';
132:     case 'potential_secrets_detected':
133:       return 'Remove sensitive files from workspace before deploying (template files like .env.example are allowed).';
134:     case 'provider_auth_failed':
135:       return 'Verify CF_ACCOUNT_ID and CF_API_TOKEN, then rerun preflight.';
136:     case 'provider_scope_missing':
137:       return 'Grant Workers Scripts/Routes edit scope to CF_API_TOKEN and rerun preflight.';
138:     case 'provider_project_not_found':
139:       return 'Set WORKSPACE_DEPLOY_PROJECT_NAME to an existing Workers project and retry.';
140:     case 'provider_rate_limited':
141:       return 'Retry deploy after Cloudflare rate limits reset.';
142:     case 'provider_invalid_output_dir':
143:       return 'Set deploy.outputDir to a valid static build directory (for example dist or out) and retry.';
144:     case 'provider_deploy_failed':
145:       return 'Check provider deployment logs and retry after fixing configuration or build output.';

147:       return null;

149: }

151: async function sha256Hex(input: string): Promise<string> {
152:   const digest = await crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', new TextEncoder().encode(input));
153:   return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest))
154:     .map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0'))
155:     .join('');
156: }

158: async function ensureWorkspaceReady(env: Env, workspaceId: string): Promise<Response | null> {
159:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
160:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
161:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
162:   }
163:   if (workspace.status !== 'ready') {
164:     return jsonResponse(
165:       {
166:         error: 'Workspace is not ready',
167:         workspace: {
168:           id: workspace.id,

170:           errorCode: workspace.errorCode,
171:           errorMessage: workspace.errorMessage,
172:         },
173:       },
174:       409
175:     );
176:   }
177:   return null;
178: }

181:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
182:   if (!workspace || workspace.status === 'deleted') {
183:     return jsonResponse({ error: 'Workspace not found' }, 404);
184:   }
185:   return null;
186: }

188: async function ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env: Env): Promise<Response | null> {
189:   const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
190:   if (!flags.workspaceDeployEnabled) {
191:     return jsonResponse(
192:       {
193:         error: 'Workspace deploy is disabled',
194:         code: 'workspace_deploy_disabled',
195:       },
196:       403

198:   }
199:   return null;
200: }

202: export async function handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(
203:   workspaceId: string,
204:   request: Request,
205:   env: Env,
206:   ctx?: ExecutionContext
207: ): Promise<Response> {
208:   try {
209:     const enabled = await ensureWorkspaceDeployEnabled(env);
210:     if (enabled) {
211:       return enabled;
212:     }
213: 
214:     const workspaceCheck = await ensureWorkspaceReady(env, workspaceId);
215:     if (workspaceCheck) {
216:       return workspaceCheck;
217:     }
218: 
219:     if (!env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE && !ctx) {
220:       return jsonResponse(
221:         {
222:           error: 'Workspace deployment runner is unavailable',
223:           code: 'workspace_deploy_runner_unavailable',
224:         },
225:         503
226:       );
227:     }
228: 
229:     const idempotencyKey = (request.headers.get('Idempotency-Key') ?? '').trim();
230:     if (!idempotencyKey) {
231:       return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required Idempotency-Key header' }, 400);
232:     }
233: 
234:     const payloadRaw = await request.text();
235:     let payload: Record<string, unknown> = {};
236:     if (payloadRaw.trim()) {
237:       const parsed = JSON.parse(payloadRaw) as unknown;
238:       if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsed)) {
239:         return jsonResponse({ error: 'Request body must be a JSON object' }, 400);
240:       }
241:       payload = parsed as Record<string, unknown>;
242:     }
243: 
244:     const providerInput = typeof payload.provider === 'string' ? payload.provider.trim() : '';
245:     if (providerInput && providerInput !== 'simulated' && providerInput !== 'cloudflare_workers_assets') {
246:       return jsonResponse(
247:         {
248:           error: 'Unsupported deployment provider',
249:           code: 'unsupported_deploy_provider',
250:           allowedProviders: ['simulated', 'cloudflare_workers_assets'],
251:         },
252:         400
253:       );
254:     }
255:     const provider = getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(providerInput || undefined, env);
256:     const retry =
257:       payload.retry && typeof payload.retry === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.retry)
258:         ? (payload.retry as Record<string, unknown>)
259:         : {};
260:     const validation =
261:       payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
262:         ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
263:         : {};
264:     const provenance =
265:       payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
266:         ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
267:         : {};
268:     const autoFix =
269:       payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
270:         ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
271:         : {};
272:     const toolchain =
273:       payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
274:         ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
275:         : {};
276:     const cache =
277:       payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
278:         ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
279:         : {};
280:     const deploy =
281:       payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
282:         ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
283:         : {};
284:     const maxRetries = parseInteger(retry.maxRetries, 2, 0, 5);
285:     const outputDir = parseDeployOutputDir(deploy.outputDir);
286: 
287:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && (!outputDir || !isSafeRelativeOutputDir(outputDir))) {
288:       return jsonResponse(
289:         {
290:           error: 'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider and must be a safe relative directory',
291:           code: 'provider_invalid_output_dir',
292:         },
293:         400
294:       );
295:     }
296: 
297:     const requestPayload = {
298:       provider,
299:       retry: {
300:         maxRetries,
301:       },
302:       validation: {
303:         runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
304:         runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
305:       },
306:       autoFix: {
307:         rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
308:         bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
309:       },
310:       toolchain: {
311:         manager: typeof toolchain.manager === 'string' && toolchain.manager.trim() ? toolchain.manager.trim() : null,
312:         version: typeof toolchain.version === 'string' && toolchain.version.trim() ? toolchain.version.trim() : null,
313:       },
314:       cache: {
315:         dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
316:       },
317:       deploy: {
318:         outputDir,
319:       },
320:       rollbackOnFailure: parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true),
321:       provenance: {
322:         trigger: typeof provenance.trigger === 'string' && provenance.trigger.trim() ? provenance.trigger.trim() : 'manual',
323:         taskId: typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' && provenance.taskId.trim() ? provenance.taskId.trim() : null,
324:         operationId:
325:           typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' && provenance.operationId.trim() ? provenance.operationId.trim() : null,
326:         note: typeof provenance.note === 'string' && provenance.note.trim() ? provenance.note.trim() : null,
327:       },
328:     };
329: 
330:     const requestPayloadSha256 = await sha256Hex(
331:       JSON.stringify(buildDeploymentIdempotencyPayload(requestPayload))
332:     );
333: 
334:     const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, {
335:       id: generateWorkspaceDeploymentId(),
336:       workspaceId,
337:       provider,
338:       idempotencyKey,
339:       requestPayload,
340:       requestPayloadSha256,
341:       maxRetries,
342:       provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
343:     });
344: 
345:     if (!created.reused) {
346:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
347:         workspaceId,
348:         deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
349:         eventType: 'deployment_created',
350:         payload: {
351:           provider,
352:           maxRetries,
353:           provenance: requestPayload.provenance,
354:         },
355:       });
356:     }
357: 
358:     if (provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && created.deployment.status === 'queued') {
359:       const hasPrecheckPassed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
360:         env.DB,
361:         workspaceId,
362:         created.deployment.id,
363:         'deployment_provider_precheck_passed'
364:       );
365:       const hasPrecheckFailed = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
366:         env.DB,
367:         workspaceId,
368:         created.deployment.id,
369:         'deployment_provider_precheck_failed'
370:       );
371:       const alreadyEnqueued = await hasWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(
372:         env.DB,
373:         workspaceId,
374:         created.deployment.id,
375:         'deployment_enqueued'
376:       );
377:       const shouldRunPrecheck = !hasPrecheckPassed && !hasPrecheckFailed && !alreadyEnqueued;
378: 
379:       if (hasPrecheckFailed) {
380:         return jsonResponse(
381:           {
382:             error: created.deployment.error?.message ?? 'Provider precheck previously failed',
383:             code: created.deployment.error?.code ?? 'provider_deploy_failed',
384:           },
385:           400
386:         );
387:       }
388: 
389:       if (!shouldRunPrecheck) {
390:         // Precheck already passed/failed or deployment has already been enqueued.
391:       } else {
392:       try {
393:         const precheckChecks = await createWorkspaceDeployProvider(provider, env).precheck();
394:         const failed = precheckChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
395:         if (failed) {
396:           const failureMessage = failed.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed';
397:           const now = new Date().toISOString();
398:           const failedUpdate = await env.DB
399:             .prepare(
400:               `UPDATE workspace_deployments
401:                SET status = 'failed',
402:                    error_code = ?,
403:                    error_message = ?,
404:                    finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
405:                    updated_at = ?
406:                WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
407:             )
408:             .bind(failed.code, failureMessage, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
409:             .run();
410: 
411:           if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
412:             await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
413:               workspaceId,
414:               deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
415:               eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
416:               payload: {
417:                 code: failed.code,
418:                 message: failureMessage,
419:               },
420:             });
421:           } else {
422:             const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
423:             if (concurrent) {
424:               return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
425:             }
426:           }
427: 
428:           return jsonResponse(
429:             {
430:               error: failureMessage,
431:               code: failed.code,
432:             },
433:             400
434:           );
435:         }
436:         await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
437:           workspaceId,
438:           deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
439:           eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_passed',
440:           payload: {
441:             checks: precheckChecks,
442:           },
443:         });
444:       } catch (error) {
445:         const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
446:         const now = new Date().toISOString();
447:         const failedUpdate = await env.DB
448:           .prepare(
449:             `UPDATE workspace_deployments
450:              SET status = 'failed',
451:                  error_code = ?,
452:                  error_message = ?,
453:                  finished_at = COALESCE(finished_at, ?),
454:                  updated_at = ?
455:              WHERE id = ? AND workspace_id = ? AND status = 'queued'`
456:           )
457:           .bind(providerError.code, providerError.message, now, now, created.deployment.id, workspaceId)
458:           .run();
459: 
460:         if ((failedUpdate.meta?.changes ?? 0) > 0) {
461:           await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
462:             workspaceId,
463:             deploymentId: created.deployment.id,
464:             eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck_failed',
465:             payload: {
466:               code: providerError.code,
467:               message: providerError.message,
468:             },
469:           });
470:         } else {
471:           const concurrent = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);
472:           if (concurrent) {
473:             return jsonResponse({ deployment: concurrent }, 200);
474:           }
475:         }
476: 
477:         return jsonResponse({ error: providerError.message, code: providerError.code }, 400);
478:       }
479:     }
480:     }
481: 
482:     const latestDeployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, created.deployment.id);

315:     if (normalized.includes(`${tool}: not found`) || normalized.includes(`${tool}: command not found`)) {
316:       return { tool, raw: output };
317:     }
318:   }
319:   if (normalized.includes('command not found')) {
320:     return { tool: 'unknown', raw: output };
321:   }
322:   return null;
323: }

351: async function detectPotentialSecrets(sandbox: SandboxClient): Promise<string[]> {
352:   const output = await runSandboxCommand(
353:     sandbox,
354:     `cd ${shellQuote(
355:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
356:     )} && python3 - <<'PY'\n# nimbus_detect_secrets\nimport json\nimport os\nimport re\n\npattern = re.compile(r'(^|/)(\\.env(\\.|$)|id_rsa|id_dsa|.*\\.pem$|.*\\.p12$|.*\\.key$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nallowed_env_templates = re.compile(r'(^|/)\\.env\\.(example|sample|template|dist|defaults)(\\.|$)', re.IGNORECASE)\nexcluded_dirs = {'.git', 'node_modules', '.next', '.nuxt', '.svelte-kit', '.turbo', '.cache', 'dist', 'build', 'coverage', 'target'}\nroot = os.getcwd()\nmatches = []\nfor dirpath, dirnames, filenames in os.walk(root):\n    rel_dir = os.path.relpath(dirpath, root)\n    if rel_dir == '.':\n        rel_dir = ''\n    if rel_dir and any(part in excluded_dirs for part in rel_dir.split(os.sep)):\n        continue\n    dirnames[:] = [d for d in dirnames if d not in excluded_dirs]\n    for name in filenames:\n        absolute = os.path.join(dirpath, name)\n        rel = os.path.relpath(absolute, root).replace('\\\\', '/')\n        if allowed_env_templates.search(rel):\n            continue\n        if pattern.search(rel):\n            matches.append(rel)\nprint(json.dumps(matches[:25]))\nPY`
357:   );
358: 
359:   const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as unknown;
360:   if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
361:     return [];
362:   }
363: 
364:   return parsed.filter((item): item is string => typeof item === 'string').slice(0, 25);
365: }

416: async function createDependencyCacheArchive(
417:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
418:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile
419: ): Promise<{ bytes: Uint8Array; sha256: string } | null> {
420:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
421:   const nodeModules = projectRoot === '.' ? 'node_modules' : `${projectRoot}/node_modules`;
422:   const result = await sandbox.exec(
423:     `cd ${shellQuote(
424:       WORKSPACE_ROOT
425:     )} && if [ ! -d ${shellQuote(
426:       nodeModules
427:     )} ]; then echo '{}'; else tmp_stem=$(mktemp /tmp/nimbus-workspace-cache.XXXXXX) && tmp_bundle="${'$'}{tmp_stem}.tar.gz" && tar -czf "${'$'}tmp_bundle" ${shellQuote(
428:       nodeModules
429:     )} && base64 "${'$'}tmp_bundle" && rm -f "${'$'}tmp_bundle" "${'$'}tmp_stem"; fi`,
430:     { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 }
431:   );
432:   if (result.exitCode !== 0) {
433:     return null;
434:   }
435:   const output = result.stdout.trim();
436:   if (!output || output === '{}') {
437:     return null;
438:   }
439:   const bytes = fromBase64(output);
440:   return {
441:     bytes,
442:     sha256: await sha256Hex(bytes),
443:   };
444: }

446: async function restoreDependencyCacheArchive(
447:   sandbox: SandboxClient,
448:   profile: WorkspaceToolchainProfile,
449:   bytes: Uint8Array
450: ): Promise<void> {
451:   const projectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(profile.projectRoot);
452:   const payload = toBase64(bytes);
453:   const tempPath = `/tmp/nimbus-cache-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)}.b64`;
454:   const reset = await sandbox.exec(`python3 - <<'PY'\nopen(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'wb').close()\nPY`);
455:   if (reset.exitCode !== 0) {
456:     const combined = [reset.stdout, reset.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
457:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to initialize dependency cache payload file');
458:   }
459: 
460:   const chunkSize = 8 * 1024;
461:   for (let offset = 0; offset < payload.length; offset += chunkSize) {
462:     const chunk = payload.slice(offset, offset + chunkSize);
463:     const append = await sandbox.exec(
464:       `python3 - <<'PY'\nwith open(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)}, 'ab') as f:\n    f.write(${JSON.stringify(chunk)}.encode('ascii'))\nPY`
465:     );
466:     if (append.exitCode !== 0) {
467:       const combined = [append.stdout, append.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
468:       throw new Error(combined || 'Failed while streaming dependency cache payload');
469:     }
470:   }
471: 
472:   const command =
473:     `cd ${shellQuote(WORKSPACE_ROOT)} && mkdir -p ${shellQuote(projectRoot)} && python3 - <<'PY'\n` +
474:     `import base64\n` +
475:     `import pathlib\n` +
476:     `import subprocess\n` +
477:     `payload_path = pathlib.Path(${JSON.stringify(tempPath)})\n` +
478:     `raw = base64.b64decode(payload_path.read_bytes())\n` +
479:     `proc = subprocess.run(['tar', '-xzf', '-', '-C', '.'], input=raw)\n` +
480:     `payload_path.unlink(missing_ok=True)\n` +
481:     `raise SystemExit(proc.returncode)\n` +
482:     `PY`;
483:   const extract = await sandbox.exec(command, { timeout: 5 * 60 * 1000 });
484:   if (extract.exitCode !== 0) {
485:     const combined = [extract.stdout, extract.stderr].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
486:     throw new Error(combined || 'Failed to restore dependency cache archive');
487:   }
488: }

539:     if (!hasSucceededEvent) {

637: function isRunningDeploymentStale(startedAt: string | null): boolean {
638:   if (!startedAt) {
639:     return false;
640:   }
641: 
642:   const startedAtEpochMs = Date.parse(startedAt);
643:   if (!Number.isFinite(startedAtEpochMs)) {
644:     return false;
645:   }
646: 
647:   return Date.now() - startedAtEpochMs >= STALE_RUNNING_TIMEOUT_MS;
648: }

657: async function executeWorkspaceDeployment(env: Env, workspaceId: string, deploymentId: string): Promise<void> {
658:   const deployment = await getWorkspaceDeployment(env.DB, workspaceId, deploymentId);
659:   if (!deployment) {
660:     return;
661:   }
662:   const payload = await getWorkspaceDeploymentRequestPayload(env.DB, deploymentId);
663:   if (!payload) {
664:     throw new PolicyError('deployment_not_found', 'Deployment payload no longer exists');
665:   }
666: 
667:   const workspace = await getWorkspace(env.DB, workspaceId);
668:   if (!workspace || workspace.status !== 'ready') {
669:     throw new PolicyError('workspace_not_ready', 'Workspace is not ready for deployment');
670:   }
671: 
672:   const validation =
673:     payload.validation && typeof payload.validation === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.validation)
674:       ? (payload.validation as Record<string, unknown>)
675:       : {};
676:   const autoFix =
677:     payload.autoFix && typeof payload.autoFix === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.autoFix)
678:       ? (payload.autoFix as Record<string, unknown>)
679:       : {};
680:   const cache =
681:     payload.cache && typeof payload.cache === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.cache)
682:       ? (payload.cache as Record<string, unknown>)
683:       : {};
684:   const requestedToolchain =
685:     payload.toolchain && typeof payload.toolchain === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.toolchain)
686:       ? (payload.toolchain as Record<string, unknown>)
687:       : null;
688:   const deploy =
689:     payload.deploy && typeof payload.deploy === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.deploy)
690:       ? (payload.deploy as Record<string, unknown>)
691:       : {};
692:   const validationOptions: DeploymentValidationOptions = {
693:     runBuildIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runBuildIfPresent, true),
694:     runTestsIfPresent: parseBoolean(validation.runTestsIfPresent, true),
695:   };
696:   const autoFixOptions: DeploymentAutoFixOptions = {
697:     rehydrateBaseline: parseBoolean(autoFix.rehydrateBaseline, false),
698:     bootstrapToolchain: parseBoolean(autoFix.bootstrapToolchain, false),
699:   };
700:   const cacheOptions: DeploymentCacheOptions = {
701:     dependencyCache: parseBoolean(cache.dependencyCache, true),
702:   };
703:   const publishOptions: DeploymentPublishOptions = {
704:     provider: getWorkspaceDeployProviderName(payload.provider, env),
705:     outputDir: parseString(deploy.outputDir),
706:   };
707:   const { runBuildIfPresent, runTestsIfPresent } = validationOptions;
708:   const rollbackOnFailure = parseBoolean(payload.rollbackOnFailure, true);
709:   const remediations: WorkspaceDeploymentRemediation[] = [];
710:   const workspaceProjectRootRaw =
711:     typeof workspace.sourceProjectRoot === 'string' && workspace.sourceProjectRoot.trim() ? workspace.sourceProjectRoot : '.';
712:   let workspaceProjectRoot = '.';
713:   try {
714:     workspaceProjectRoot = normalizeProjectRoot(workspaceProjectRootRaw);
715:   } catch (error) {
716:     throw new PolicyError('invalid_project_root', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
717:   }
718: 
719:   if (publishOptions.provider === 'cloudflare_workers_assets' && !publishOptions.outputDir) {
720:     throw new PolicyError(
721:       'provider_invalid_output_dir',
722:       'deploy.outputDir is required for cloudflare_workers_assets provider'
723:     );
724:   }
725: 
726:   const sandbox = await sandboxResolver(env, workspace.sandboxId);
727:   try {
728:     await ensureWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
729:   } catch (error) {
730:     if (!(error instanceof PolicyError) || error.code !== 'baseline_missing') {
731:       throw error;
732:     }
733: 
734:     if (!autoFixOptions.rehydrateBaseline) {
735:       throw error;
736:     }
737: 
738:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
739:       workspaceId,
740:       deploymentId,
741:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_attempted',
742:       payload: {},
743:     });
744: 
745:     const rehydrated = await tryRehydrateWorkspaceGitBaseline(sandbox);
746:     if (!rehydrated) {
747:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
748:         workspaceId,
749:         deploymentId,
750:         eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_failed',
751:         payload: {},
752:       });
753:       throw new PolicyError('baseline_rehydrate_failed', 'Workspace git baseline is missing and could not be rehydrated');
754:     }
755: 
756:     remediations.push({ code: 'baseline_rehydrated', applied: true });
757:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
758:       workspaceId,
759:       deploymentId,
760:       eventType: 'deployment_baseline_rehydrate_succeeded',
761:       payload: {},
762:     });
763:   }
764: 
765:   const provenance =
766:     payload.provenance && typeof payload.provenance === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.provenance)
767:       ? (payload.provenance as Record<string, unknown>)
768:       : {};
769:   const taskId = typeof provenance.taskId === 'string' ? provenance.taskId : null;
770:   const operationId = typeof provenance.operationId === 'string' ? provenance.operationId : null;
771:   if (taskId) {
772:     const task = await getWorkspaceTask(env.DB, workspaceId, taskId);
773:     if (!task) {
774:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_task', 'Referenced taskId does not belong to workspace');
775:     }
776:   }
777:   if (operationId) {
778:     const operation = await getWorkspaceOperation(env.DB, workspaceId, operationId);
779:     if (!operation) {
780:       throw new PolicyError('invalid_provenance_operation', 'Referenced operationId does not belong to workspace');
781:     }
782:   }
783: 
784:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
785:     workspaceId,
786:     deploymentId,
787:     eventType: 'deployment_started',
788:     payload: {
789:       provider: deployment.provider,
790:       attemptCount: deployment.attemptCount,
791:       runBuildIfPresent,
792:       runTestsIfPresent,
793:       autoFix: autoFixOptions,
794:       cache: cacheOptions,
795:     },
796:   });
797: 
798:   await throwIfDeploymentCancelled(env, workspaceId, deploymentId);
799: 
800:   let provider;
801:   try {
802:     provider = createWorkspaceDeployProvider(publishOptions.provider, env);
803:     const providerChecks = await provider.precheck();
804:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
805:       workspaceId,
806:       deploymentId,
807:       eventType: 'deployment_provider_precheck',
808:       payload: {
809:         provider: publishOptions.provider,
810:         checks: providerChecks,
811:       },
812:     });
813:     const failedCheck = providerChecks.find((check) => !check.ok);
814:     if (failedCheck) {
815:       throw new PolicyError(failedCheck.code, failedCheck.details ?? 'Provider precheck failed');
816:     }
817:   } catch (error) {
818:     const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
819:     throw new PolicyError(providerError.code, providerError.message);
820:   }
821: 
822:   let toolchain: WorkspaceToolchainProfile;
823:   try {
824:     toolchain = applyRequestedToolchainOverride(
825:       await detectWorkspaceToolchainProfile(
826:         sandbox,
827:         workspaceProjectRoot
828:       ),
829:       requestedToolchain
830:     );
831:   } catch (error) {
832:     throw new PolicyError('toolchain_detect_failed', error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
833:   }
834: 
835:   await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
836:     workspaceId,
837:     deploymentId,
838:     eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_detected',
839:     payload: toolchain,
840:   });
841: 
842:   if (toolchain.manager === 'unknown') {
843:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
844:       workspaceId,
845:       deploymentId,
846:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_unknown_fallback',
847:       payload: { fallbackManager: 'npm' },
848:     });
849:   }
850: 
851:   await updateWorkspaceDeploymentStatus(env.DB, deploymentId, 'running', {
852:     workspaceId,
853:     toolchain,
854:     remediations,
855:   });
856: 
857:   const scripts = await detectPackageScriptsInProjectRoot(sandbox, workspaceProjectRoot);
858:   const shouldBootstrapForValidation =
859:     (runTestsIfPresent && scripts.hasTest) || (runBuildIfPresent && scripts.hasBuild);
860: 
861:   if (autoFixOptions.bootstrapToolchain && shouldBootstrapForValidation) {
862:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
863:       workspaceId,
864:       deploymentId,
865:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_started',
866:       payload: {
867:         manager: toolchain.manager,
868:         version: toolchain.version,
869:       },
870:     });
871:     try {
872:       await bootstrapToolchainIfNeeded(sandbox, toolchain);
873:       if (toolchain.manager === 'pnpm' || toolchain.manager === 'yarn') {
874:         remediations.push({ code: 'toolchain_bootstrapped', applied: true });
875:       }
876:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
877:         workspaceId,
878:         deploymentId,
879:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
880:         payload: { manager: toolchain.manager },
881:       });
882:     } catch (error) {
883:       await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
884:         workspaceId,
885:         deploymentId,
886:         eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_failed',
887:         payload: {
888:           manager: toolchain.manager,
889:           message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
890:         },
891:       });
892:       throw error;
893:     }
894:   } else {
895:     await appendWorkspaceDeploymentEvent(env.DB, {
896:       workspaceId,
897:       deploymentId,
898:       eventType: 'deployment_toolchain_bootstrap_succeeded',
899:       payload: { manager: toolchain.manager, skipped: true },
900:     });
901:   }

parts.text:
Found 2 blocking concurrency issues in the Phase 7 changes.

- **Blocking: concurrent create requests can race precheck and incorrectly fail a shared deployment**
  - In `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:359`, precheck execution is guarded only by event existence checks (`hasPrecheckPassed/Failed`, `alreadyEnqueued`) and is not claimed atomically.
  - Two same-idempotency requests can both run precheck; if one passes and the other transiently fails, the failing request can still flip `workspace_deployments.status` to `failed` via the queued-only update at `packages/worker/src/api/workspace-deployments.ts:398`.
  - Result: deployment can be failed due to request-level race/interleaving rather than true provider readiness.
  - This needs a single-winner precheck claim (DB state transition/event insert with uniqueness) before running provider precheck.

- **Blocking: cancel/request race marks deployment cancelled even when provider cancel is rejected and deploy succeeds**
  - In `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1134`, cancel is detected and `provider.cancelDeployment` is attempted; when `accepted=false`, polling continues (intended).
  - But success write uses `markWorkspaceDeploymentSucceededIfNotCancelled` (requires `cancel_requested_at IS NULL`) at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1226` / `packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:2237`.
  - If a cancel was requested at any point, success cannot be persisted; code then forces local cancel at `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deployment-runner.ts:1240`, even if provider reached `succeeded`.
  - Result: local state can report `cancelled` while provider has a live successful deployment (state divergence caused by cancellation timing).
  - Fix needs state handling that distinguishes “cancel requested but provider refused/too late” from true cancellation before blocking success persistence.
